levels.briefing: Sort devices into INPUT / OUTPUT / MEMORY.
Match each task to the best PC config.

rounds.prompt: School network with one server and 20 PCs.

levels.prompt: Install three security modules into the link.

rounds.scenario: Server receives millions of requests from many IPs.
Fake bank email asks user to enter password on fake page.
Attacker in open Wi-Fi intercepts traffic between users and server.

levels.briefing: Calculate network, broadcast and host count.
